input.content:
@echo off
setlocal enabledelayedexpansion

REM === release.bat ===
REM Copies build output to E:\micronet and backs up existing files first.

set "SRC_BASE=%~dp0"
set "DST_BASE=E:\micronet"
set "BACKUP_BASE=%DST_BASE%\backup"

REM Generate timestamp (YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS)
for /f "tokens=2 delims==" %%I in ('wmic os get localdatetime /value') do set "DT=%%I"
set "TIMESTAMP=%DT:~0,4%%DT:~4,2%%DT:~6,2%_%DT:~8,2%%DT:~10,2%%DT:~12,2%"
set "BACKUP_DIR=%BACKUP_BASE%\%TIMESTAMP%"

echo ============================================
echo  Release Script
echo  Timestamp: %TIMESTAMP%
echo ============================================

REM Define source and destination pairs
set "SRC[0]=%SRC_BASE%Build\Image\exe_test\exe"
set "DST[0]=%DST_BASE%\exe"
set "SRC[1]=%SRC_BASE%bin"
set "DST[1]=%DST_BASE%\bin"
set "SRC[2]=%SRC_BASE%Build\Image\exe_test\dll"
set "DST[2]=%DST_BASE%\dll"
set "SRC[3]=%SRC_BASE%Build\Image\exe_test\tool\exe"
set "DST[3]=%DST_BASE%\tool\exe"

set "PAIR_COUNT=4"

REM --- Step 1: Verify source directories exist ---
echo.
echo [Step 1] Verifying source directories...
set "HAS_ERROR=0"
for /l %%i in (0,1,3) do (
    if not exist "!SRC[%%i]!" (
        echo   ERROR: Source not found: !SRC[%%i]!
        set "HAS_ERROR=1"
    ) else (
        echo   OK: !SRC[%%i]!
    )
)
if "%HAS_ERROR%"=="1" (
    echo.
    echo Aborted: one or more source directories are missing.
    exit /b 1
)

REM --- Step 2: Backup existing destination folders ---
echo.
echo [Step 2] Backing up destination folders to %BACKUP_DIR% ...
mkdir "%BACKUP_DIR%" 2>nul

for /l %%i in (0,1,3) do (
    if exist "!DST[%%i]!" (
        REM Derive relative folder name for backup (e.g. exe, bin, dll, tool\exe)

@echo off
setlocal enabledelayedexpansion

REM === release.bat ===
REM Copies build output to E:\micronet and backs up existing files first.

set "SRC_BASE=%~dp0"
set "DST_BASE=E:\micronet"
set "BACKUP_BASE=%DST_BASE%\backup"

REM Generate timestamp (YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS)
set "TIMESTAMP=%date:~0,4%%date:~5,2%%date:~8,2%_%time:~0,2%%time:~3,2%%time:~6,2%"
set "TIMESTAMP=%TIMESTAMP: =0%"
set "BACKUP_DIR=%BACKUP_BASE%\%TIMESTAMP%"

echo ============================================
echo  Release Script
echo  Timestamp: %TIMESTAMP%
echo ============================================

REM Define source and destination pairs
set "SRC[0]=%SRC_BASE%Build\Image\exe_test\exe"
set "DST[0]=%DST_BASE%\exe"
set "SRC[1]=%SRC_BASE%bin"
set "DST[1]=%DST_BASE%\bin"
set "SRC[2]=%SRC_BASE%Build\Image\exe_test\dll"
set "DST[2]=%DST_BASE%\dll"
set "SRC[3]=%SRC_BASE%Build\Image\exe_test\tool\exe"
set "DST[3]=%DST_BASE%\tool\exe"

set "PAIR_COUNT=4"

REM --- Step 1: Verify source directories exist ---
echo.
echo [Step 1] Verifying source directories...
set "HAS_ERROR=0"
for /l %%i in (0,1,3) do (
    if not exist "!SRC[%%i]!" (
        echo   ERROR: Source not found: !SRC[%%i]!
        set "HAS_ERROR=1"
    ) else (
        echo   OK: !SRC[%%i]!
    )
)
if "%HAS_ERROR%"=="1" (
    echo.
    echo Aborted: one or more source directories are missing.
    exit /b 1
)

REM --- Step 2: Backup existing destination folders ---
echo.
echo [Step 2] Backing up destination folders to %BACKUP_DIR% ...
mkdir "%BACKUP_DIR%" 2>nul

for /l %%i in (0,1,3) do (
    if exist "!DST[%%i]!" (
        REM Derive relative folder name for backup (e.g. exe, bin, dll, tool\exe)
        set "REL=!DST[%%i]:%DST_BASE%\=!"
        echo   Backing up !DST[%%i]! -^> %BACKUP_DIR%\!REL!
        robocopy "!DST[%%i]!" "%BACKUP_DIR%\!REL!" /E /NFL /NDL /NJH /NJS /NC /NS >nul 2>&1
    ) else (
        echo   Skip (not found): !DST[%%i]!
    )
)
echo   Backup complete.

REM --- Step 3: Copy build output to destination ---
echo.
echo [Step 3] Copying build output...
set "COPY_ERROR=0"
for /l %%i in (0,1,3) do (
    echo   !SRC[%%i]! -^> !DST[%%i]!
    robocopy "!SRC[%%i]!" "!DST[%%i]!" /E /NFL /NDL /NJH /NJS /NC /NS
    if !errorlevel! GEQ 8 (
        echo   ERROR: Failed to copy !SRC[%%i]!
        set "COPY_ERROR=1"
    )
)

echo.
if "%COPY_ERROR%"=="1" (
    echo [RESULT] Completed with errors. Check the output above.
    exit /b 1
) else (
    echo [RESULT] Release completed successfully.
    echo   Backup location: %BACKUP_DIR%
)

endlocal
exit /b 0
